summary_en: Socialwire to acquire 100% of SEIRYO Co. Ltd., a TikTok and short-form video advertising operator with ByteDance partnership status. SEIRYO generates high gross margins through performance-based SNS advertising. Acquisition part of strategy to reach ¥5B revenue target by FY3/28. Deal terms (consideration, timing) not yet disclosed.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Shares of SEIRYO Co., Ltd. (Complete Subsidiary Status)
translation_en_brief: Socialwire Co., Ltd. announced on 29 May 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire 100% of the issued shares of SEIRYO Co., Ltd. and make it a wholly owned subsidiary. SEIRYO operates a performance-based SNS advertising support business focused on TikTok and short-form video content, holding an authorized partner agreement with ByteDance. The company operates with a lean team structure and generates high gross margins. Socialwire positioned this acquisition as a strategic growth investment toward the group's medium-term target of ¥5 billion in revenue by March 2028. The rationale emphasizes synergies between SEIRYO's high operational efficiency and Socialwire's system development capabilities and process optimization expertise, expected to improve productivity and build scalable operations. Post-acquisition, Socialwire intends to strengthen TikTok and short-video advertising operations, drive cross-selling and upselling across combined customer bases, and integrate organizational knowledge and system infrastructure. SEIRYO was established in June 2020, is headquartered in Tokyo, employs 5 people, and is currently 100% owned by Mikan Co. Financial data for the three most recent fiscal years is provided; the acquisition consideration and timeline have not yet been disclosed.
